name: HTS_SCHEDULE_SHIFTS
description: Table holding the shifts scheduled for employees.

columns.Name: SCHEDULE_SHIFT_ID
columns.Comments: Primary Key. System generated unique identifier for a Schedule Shift.

columns.Name: SCHEDULE_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of the Schedule to which the shift belongs.

columns.Name: SCHEDULE_UNIT_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of the Schedule Unit to which the shift belongs.

columns.Name: APPROVAL_REQ_TO_CLAIM_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates if an approval is needed when the shift is claimed

columns.Name: SKILL_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of the Skill for which the shift is created.

columns.Name: PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: PersonId to which shift is assigned to.

columns.Name: ASSIGNMENT_ID
columns.Comments: AssignmentId of the person to which shift is assigned to.

columns.Name: SHIFT_TYPE
columns.Comments: Indicates whether the shift is Regular or On-Call or any custom shift type

columns.Name: SHIFT_TYPE_ID
columns.Comments: Id of the shift type (defined as an extend lookup for the lookup type ORA_HTS_SHIFT_TYPE)

columns.Name: SHIFT_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of the shift from Shift library associated to the Schedule Shift.

columns.Name: START_DATE_TIME
columns.Comments: Start date time of the shift

columns.Name: END_DATE_TIME
columns.Comments: End date time of the shift.

columns.Name: START_TIME_TZ_OFFSET
columns.Comments: Timezone offset of shift's start time. Unit of time is minute

columns.Name: END_TIME_TZ_OFFSET
columns.Comments: Timezone offset of shift's end time. Unit of time is minute

columns.Name: REF_DATE
columns.Comments: Reference or Actual date of the shift.

columns.Name: WORK_DURATION
columns.Comments: Duration of the Work in minutes

columns.Name: BREAK_DURATION
columns.Comments: Break time in minutes

columns.Name: SOURCE
columns.Comments: Origin of the shift, indicating if it was imported, edited in the UI or computed.

columns.Name: LOCKED_FLAG
columns.Comments: Flag indicating if the shift is locked for further updates.

columns.Name: ASSIGNMENT_MODE
columns.Comments: Indicating how the resource was assigned to the shift or null for open shift

columns.Name: SHIFT_CATEGORY
columns.Comments: Indicating shift's category

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: ENTERPRISE_ID
columns.Comments: ENTERPRISE_ID

columns.Name: COMMENTS
columns.Comments: Comment that may be provided as information at creation or when updating the shift.

columns.Name: ASSIGNED_BY
columns.Comments: Person ID of the user who assigned the scheduled shift to a worker

columns.Name: ASSIGNMENT_DATE
columns.Comments: Indicates the date and time the shift was assigned to a person.

columns.Name: PREMIUM_SHIFT_CODE
columns.Comments: A code added to the shift that qualifies the type of scheduled hours as premium

columns.Name: OPPORTUNITY_TYPE
columns.Comments: Type of the opportunity available to the worker.

columns.Name: AVAIL_TO_OTHER_DEPT_FLAG
columns.Comments: For a opportunity shift, indicates if it is available to assignments from the departments not in the current schedule.

columns.Name: SHIFT_GROUP_ID
columns.Comments: The field contains the unique id to group for any open shifts.Identical shifts will have the same unique id value.

columns.Name: SHIFT_INCENTIVE
columns.Comments: Incentive provided if shift is assigned.

columns.Name: ALLOW_OVERTIME_FLAG
columns.Comments: Flag denoting whether worker can exceed FTE with this shift.

columns.Name: PAID_BREAK_DURATION
columns.Comments: Current paid break duration in minutes

columns.Name: MANUAL_PAID_BREAK_DURATION
columns.Comments: Paid break duration in minutes from manual input

columns.Name: EXTERNAL_SYSTEM_REFERENCE
columns.Comments: Stores the external, original application reference identifier

columns.Name: ORIGINAL_SOURCE
columns.Comments: Stores the creation source, such as Workforce Scheduling app or HCM Data Loader, until the shift is deleted

columns.Name: IMPORT_PROVIDER
columns.Comments: Contains the Request Source value (exporter code or requestor's name) of the schedule event request that caused the shift to be created.

columns.Name: ALLOW_CLAIM_PARTIAL_SHIFT_FLAG
columns.Comments: Flag indicating whether the shift can be partially claimed

columns.Name: OPPORTUNITY_ROTATION_FLAG
columns.Comments: Flag indicating if the oportunity shift is available for rotation

columns.Name: MOCK_DISCRIMINATOR
columns.Comments: MOCK_DISCRIMINATOR

columns.Name: ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY
columns.Comments: Descriptive Flexfield: structure definition of the user descriptive flexfield.

columns.Name: ATTRIBUTE1
columns.Comments: Descriptive Flexfield: segment of the user descriptive flexfield.

columns.Name: ATTRIBUTE2
columns.Comments: Descriptive Flexfield: segment of the user descriptive flexfield.

columns.Name: ATTRIBUTE3
columns.Comments: Descriptive Flexfield: segment of the user descriptive flexfield.

columns.Name: ATTRIBUTE4
columns.Comments: Descriptive Flexfield: segment of the user descriptive flexfield.

columns.Name: ATTRIBUTE5
columns.Comments: Descriptive Flexfield: segment of the user descriptive flexfield.

columns.Name: ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER1
columns.Comments: Descriptive Flexfield: segment of the user descriptive flexfield.

columns.Name: ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER2
columns.Comments: Descriptive Flexfield: segment of the user descriptive flexfield.

columns.Name: ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER3
columns.Comments: Descriptive Flexfield: segment of the user descriptive flexfield.

columns.Name: ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER4
columns.Comments: Descriptive Flexfield: segment of the user descriptive flexfield.

columns.Name: ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER5
columns.Comments: Descriptive Flexfield: segment of the user descriptive flexfield.

columns.Name: ATTRIBUTE_DATE1
columns.Comments: Descriptive Flexfield: segment of the user descriptive flexfield.

columns.Name: ATTRIBUTE_DATE2
columns.Comments: Descriptive Flexfield: segment of the user descriptive flexfield.

columns.Name: ATTRIBUTE_DATE3
columns.Comments: Descriptive Flexfield: segment of the user descriptive flexfield.

columns.Name: ATTRIBUTE_DATE4
columns.Comments: Descriptive Flexfield: segment of the user descriptive flexfield.

columns.Name: ATTRIBUTE_DATE5
columns.Comments: Descriptive Flexfield: segment of the user descriptive flexfield.
